title: wedelia elottiana
intro: Wedelia elottiana, also known as Butterfly Weed or Wedelia, is a flowering plant native to tropical America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and succulent leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. Its health benefits include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
